topic: A person making a peanut butter and jelly sandwich.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: Wide: A person stands at the counter with bread, peanut butter, and jelly prepared for the sandwich.
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: Close-up: The person uses a knife to scoop peanut butter and spreads it over a bread slice.
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: Top-down: The person spreads jelly on the other slice and joins the two halves to complete the sandwich.
parsed_generation.narration: An 8-second sequence follows a single subject at the counter from setup to sandwich completion. It transitions from a wide establishing shot to a close-up of spreading peanut butter and a top-down view of adding jelly and sealing the sandwich.

feedback: Strengths: the sequence centers on a single subject and uses distinct camera angles (wide, close-up, top-down) to show the acts of making the sandwich. However, it diverges from the gold standard by using three shots and omitting the explicit final diagonal cut. Fixes: align structure with the gold standard’s two 4-second segments [00:00-00:04] (bread laid out, spreads on each slice) and [00:04-00:08] (assemble and cut diagonally into two triangles); add concrete visual details such as purple jelly and smooth peanut butter to increase richness.
strengths: Single subject focus with clear camera angles
fixes: Adopt the two-shot, four-second cadence to match the gold standard (e.g., [00:00-00:04], [00:04-00:08])
Describe explicit final action of diagonal cutting and use concrete visuals (e.g., purple jelly, smooth peanut butter)
